name: mapbox-downloader
description: Cross-platform production tile downloader with row-level resume and provider configs.

scripts.download: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js
scripts.validate: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js --validate
scripts.download:mapbox-pbf: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js configs/mapbox-pbf.config.json
scripts.download:esri-satellite: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js configs/esri-satellite.config.json
scripts.download:mapbox-satellite: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js configs/mapbox-satellite.config.json
scripts.download:mapbox-dem: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js configs/mapbox-dem.config.json
scripts.upload: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/install-storj-uplink.js --if-missing && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node storj-uploader.js
scripts.storj-upload: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/install-storj-uplink.js --if-missing && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node storj-uploader.js
scripts.download:mapbox-pbf-splits: npm run ensure:agent && node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/dashboard-run.js -- node downloader.js configs/mapbox-pbf-cig.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-cmi.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-kuh.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-kyj.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-mcs.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-rhc.config.json

author: XXX
